segments.text: Every single one of those nairs in Raru's face.
Was that a jump? If I recall correctly, he does not have a jump.
Doesn't seem like he has it anymore. Yup, he was able to catch it.

full_text: Every single one of those nairs in Raru's face. Was that a jump? If I recall correctly, he does not have a jump. Doesn't seem like he has it anymore. Yup, he was able to catch it.
